title: Gallery Compat For C&C
description: Adds icons to paintings from Caverns & Chasms. Also an extra icon for Soulful Nether.
body:
Adds Gallery painting icons for every Caverns & Chasms painting. Also has an extra painting icon for Soulful Nether mod. Will become outdated once Team Abnormals implement compat themselves.

[Caverns & Chasms](https://modrinth.com/mod/caverns-and-chasms)

[Soulful Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/soulfulnether)
